title: Smashing!
description: A Minecraft mod inspired by Terraria's pots!
body:
![Title](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/926370297362411520/954910188337512498/trimmed.png?width=1025&height=269)







This mod adds breakable pots that drop helpful loot when broken, which can range from torches to emeralds and plenty in between! Pots also drop shards that you can use to make pots of your own!

In the future we plan on having biome variant pots with specialized loot, and mod compat so you can get things like ropes and bombs from other mods!

Requires [Pollen](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pollen)!

![Demo Image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/840459799774232596/953454805588791386/unknown.png?width=741&height=473)
